rulings.Case Title: JERRY GIBSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 11, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT HOKE, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to September 25, 2009, per stipulation and order of September 3, 2009. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JERRY GIBSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 11, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICTION. Motion for summary judgment withdrawn. Motion for Summary Adjudication granted as to false representation and premises owner/contractor liability which are not opposed. Summary Adjudication grantd as to punitive damages in that plaintiff fails to show that defendant acted with malice, oppression or fraud. The answers to special interrogatories only contain conclusory allegations that defendant was generally aware of the dangers of asbestos which are insufficient. (UMF71.) =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN JIMENEZ VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 11, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT SPECIAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Off Calendar, per moving party. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN JIMENEZ VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 11, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT PEERLESS INDUSTRIES, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment denied, failure to shift the burden of proof. Plaintiff testified that he worked with defendant's boiler and defendant does not present any evidence that the boiler did not have asbestos. Motion for Summary ajudication denied because notice of motion is for summary judgment only. CRC 3.1350(b). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 11, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT SCOTT COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Objection to Mingram declaration overruled if declaration signed. Objection to Ay declaration overruled. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM COOPER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 11, 2009, line 13, DEFENDANT THE GOODYEAR TIRE & RUBBER COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment and summary adjudication denied as to negligence, strict liability and loss of consortium causes of action. Failure to shift burden of proof. Objection pursuant to Dicola vs. White Brothers Performance Products, Inc. (2008) 158 Cal.App.4th 666 overruled. Objections to Cooper and Ay declarations overruled. Summary adjudication granted as to false representation and punitive damages claims. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM COOPER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 11, 2009, line 13, DEFENDANT TOSCO REFINING COMPANY, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment denied, failure to shift burden of proof. Court sustains plaintiff's objections to Holz testimony. Even if Holz testimony were admissible, defendant does not properly cite that evidence in compliance with CRC 3.1350(d). =(302/CWW)
